title: Reacting Naturally in Conversation
description: 今天练习自然接话：不只是 yes/no，而是像真人一样回应.

items.cn: 表示理解对方逻辑，安全高频.
examples: That makes sense. I hadn't thought of it that way.
That makes sense given the timeline.
Yeah, that makes sense to me.
dialogue: We should wait until the numbers are final.
That makes sense. Let's hold off for now.

items.cn: 接受对方理由，但不一定完全同意.
examples: Fair enough. I get why you'd prefer that.
Fair enough, let's do it your way.
Fair enough. The timing is tricky.
dialogue: I don't really want to go out tonight.
Fair enough. We can just order in.

items.cn: 自然表达惊讶，别在正式场合过度使用.
examples: That's kind of wild that they changed it last minute.
That's kind of wild, but I believe it.
dialogue: That's kind of wild. Didn't they just move it yesterday?

items.cn: 表示能理解对方感受或观点.
examples: I can see that. It does look confusing.
I can see why that would be frustrating.
I can see that being an issue later.
dialogue: I can see that. It adds a few extra steps.

items.cn: 朋友聊天里很自然的共鸣表达.
examples: Honestly, same. I need a quiet weekend.
Honestly, same. That meeting took me out.
dialogue: I don't want to make any decisions today.
Honestly, same. My brain is done.
